meaning: n.床垫,空气垫,(用以护堤等的)沉床
examples: The mattress is best on a solid bed base.
He crouched down and reached under the mattress.
The mattress and base are normally bought as a set.
Switch gears to contemporary art, housed at the unique Mattress Factory (www.mattress.org), which supports artists-in-residence and room-sized works.
Even a king size mattress is not big enough to stash this much winnings.
